name: Pengaturan Akun - Ubah Nama, Ubah Password, Toggle Dark/Light Mode
description: Test pengaturan akun: ubah nama profil, ubah password, toggle dark mode dan light mode. Login admin dulu.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, click login
Click the dark mode toggle button
The UI switches to dark mode
Click the toggle again to switch back to light mode
The UI returns to light mode
Find the profile information section and click edit, change the name field to 'Admin Updated Name', then click Simpan
Success notification appears and name is updated
Find the change password section, fill current password with 'password', fill new password with 'NewPassword123!', confirm new password, then click Simpan
Password updated successfully with success notification
Log out and login again with password 'NewPassword123!' to verify new password works
Login with new password is successful
Navigate back to /settings/user and change password back to 'password' using 'NewPassword123!' as current password
